positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a majestic forest fox curled in a semi-circle, surrounded by glowing crystalline mushrooms and ethereal forest mist. The fox should have clean, geometric silhouettes, emphasizing its tail and pointed ears. Use a deep jewel-toned color palette—sapphire blue, emerald green, and amethyst purple—with stark white/silver accents for the crystalline elements. Composition should be perfectly centered and symmetrical, designed for maximum visual impact on apparel. The style is modern vector illustration mixed with bioluminescent fantasy art, featuring thick outlines and high contrast. Studio quality, high saturation, print-ready.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, logo, complex background, busy, extra limbs, low quality, bad anatomy
